name: Opik (Open-Source LLM Evaluation & Tracing)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0); Comet ML; Cloud hosted plan available

auth.notes: Comet ML API key for cloud; self-hosted needs no key

performance.notes: Async tracing with minimal overhead to LLM calls

agent_readiness.notes: Open-source LLM evaluation and observability platform by Comet ML. @opik.track decorator for tracing. opik.Opik() client for programmatic tracing. Built-in eval metrics: hallucination, answer relevance, context precision, toxicity. LLM judge-based evaluation. Dataset management for eval sets. Prompt versioning. LangChain, LlamaIndex, OpenAI SDK integrations. Self-hostable via Docker. Web UI for trace exploration. Alternative to Langfuse for teams wanting open-source eval + observability together.

gotchas: Evaluation metrics require additional LLM calls (cost)
best_when: Teams wanting open-source LLM tracing + evaluation together
Projects needing LLM judge-based eval metrics
Comet ML users wanting integrated LLM observability
avoid_when: Teams with existing Langfuse or W&B investment
summary: Opik is an open-source LLM evaluation and tracing platform by Comet ML. @opik.track decorator for automatic tracing. Built-in eval metrics (hallucination, relevance, toxicity) using LLM judges. Dataset management, prompt versioning, LangChain/LlamaIndex integrations. Self-hostable. Alternative to Langfuse with stronger evaluation capabilities. Python-first.
